description: Digital Logbook — blockchain-verified personal flight record

hard_stops.label: Duplicate Flight Entry
hard_stops.logic: Duplicate flight entry detected — same date, route, and aircraft

hard_stops.label: Time Categories Invalid
hard_stops.logic: Flight time categories do not sum correctly

soft_flags.label: Unverified Import
soft_flags.logic: Imported flight data pending pilot review and verification

soft_flags.label: Dispatch Record Discrepancy
soft_flags.logic: Manual entry differs from dispatch record by >15 minutes

soft_flags.label: Flight Hour Milestone Approaching
soft_flags.logic: Approaching flight hour milestone (e.g., 1000h, ATP minimums)
